title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 13 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 13 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 13 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/10/2022
DCE iron ore futures declined by 2.45% today, the main contract closed 696.General transactions in the market.PBF at Shandong port dealt730- 735 yuan/mt, decrease 10-20 yuan/mt;PBF at Tangshan port dealt 760 yuan/mt. According to SMM statistics, the total stock of the top 10 domestic ports fell slightly by 1.3% to 88.95 million tons this week. In terms of varieties, the inventory of crude powder and block ore declined significantly.
